occurrence_sentence: TQD Exclusive Interview: Quantum Pioneer John Martinis Still Wants to Build Quantum Computers — and Make Them More Powerful
John Martinis, professor of physics at the University of California, Santa Barbara, may have moved on from Google's quantum computer project, but he hasn't moved on from quantum computing.

In an exclusive interview with The Quantum Daily, Martinis said he still is involved in the quantum computing community and wants to pass on the knowledge he's gained from decades in the field, as well as from years spent helping lead Google's team in developing the quantum computer recognized as the first to achieve quantum supremacy.
